title: Arboreal Ripening Grove: resumed legacy backlog batch 12
body: Dedicated knowledge-curation batch 12 resumed. Active-claims scan found no active claims and no active commit intents; prior claim 923d0e3b is closed unlanded. I opened claim a53d0d6e for the legacy backlog, napkin, repo-continuity, thread record, and collaboration-state closeout surfaces. Scope is the five batch-12 items only, processed in place with no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
